name: oh-my-setting
description: Shared coding-agent harness hooks for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Skill hints and guarded turn completion for Codex.
interface.longDescription: oh-my-setting adds local Codex hooks that route prompts to installed skills and guard high-risk coding turns so final answers state verification status.
defaultPrompt: Use oh-my-setting harness guidance for this coding task.
